name: Exploring Data Augmentation and Resampling Strategies for Transformer-Based Models to Address Class Imbalance in AI Scoring of Scientific Explanations in NGSS Classroom
summary: NARST 2026 conference preprint on class imbalance in AI scoring of high school NGSS scientific explanations. The study uses GPT-generated synthetic student responses, EASE, and ALP augmentation to improve transformer-based classification of rubric categories and explicitly calls for further validity work and expert quality checks.

access_attempts.notes: arXiv metadata, authors, abstract, DOI, conference note, and PDF link verified.
PDF downloaded and text extracted locally.
